title: Roast Chicken with Smoky Fluffy Mashed Potatoes
description: A classic comfort food dish featuring a juicy roasted chicken served with smoky fluffy mashed potatoes.
instructions: Rinse the chicken breast and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and roast.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides, then transfer to a baking dish.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, boil the potatoes in a large pot of salted water until tender.
Drain the potatoes and mash with milk, butter, and minced garlic.
Serve the roasted chicken with smoky fluffy mashed potatoes.
